headline: RSHO: The Right Theme, Not The Best ETF
summary: The Tema American Reshoring ETF offers a concentrated, high-conviction portfolio of U.S. reshoring beneficiaries. Read the full analysis here and which other ETF we recommend over this one.

headline: Ingersoll Rand Stock: Is IR Underperforming the Industrial Sector?
summary: Ingersoll Rand has underperformed the broader industrial sector over the past year. However, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about its prospects.
